info.name: Screening Service
info.description:
Every endpoint of the **Screening Service** (`apps/screening-service`) тАФ the Kafka consumer that runs a background check on each registered applicant.

Base URL variable: `screeningBaseUrl` (default `http://localhost:8082`).

This service has **no write API** тАФ it reacts to `applicant-registered` events from Kafka. `GET /screenings` is a read-only view of recent decisions, used here to *prove the event flowed through*. So the demo is: register applicants in the **KYC Service** collection (with Kafka running), wait a moment, then run "Recent screenings" here and watch the `CLEARED` / `REVIEW` / `BLOCKED` decisions appear.

See `apps/postman/README.md` for the full Day-1 demo script.

item.name: Screenings

exec: pm.test('returns a JSON array of decisions', () => pm.expect(body).to.be.an('array'));
console.log('No screenings yet тАФ register applicants in the KYC Service collection (with Kafka up) and retry in a second.');
pm.test('each screening has a decision and a risk score', () => {

request.description:
Most-recent-first list of background-check results. Each entry: `applicantId`, `fullName`, `nationalId`, `decision` (`CLEARED`/`REVIEW`/`BLOCKED`), `riskScore`, `reason`, `screenedAt`.

The test script logs a tally of decisions to the Postman console (View тЖТ Show Postman Console) so you can narrate it live.

item.description: The read-only view of completed screenings.

item.name: Health & metrics

request.description: SmallRye Health roll-up, including the custom `ScreeningLivenessCheck`.
Readiness probe тАФ includes the Kafka connector health (consumer connected).
Micrometer/Prometheus scrape endpoint. Look for `screenings_processed_total`, `screenings_duplicate_total`, and `screenings_decision_total{decision=...}`.

item.description: Operational endpoints exposed by SmallRye Health + Micrometer.
